title: Compare two Energy Systems approaches
description: Compare two real approaches inside Energy Systems and explain which one is stronger under which conditions.
whyItMatters: Richer judgment in Energy Systems comes from seeing when one strong-looking idea actually loses on context or constraints.

steps.title: Pick two credible approaches
steps.description: Choose two approaches, schools, tools, or strategies inside Energy Systems.

steps.title: Define the evaluation criteria
steps.description: Use the tradeoff lens to make the comparison dimensions explicit.

steps.title: Run the comparison
steps.description: Assess where each approach is strong, weak, fast, risky, or context-dependent.

steps.title: State the verdict carefully
steps.description: Explain which option wins under which circumstances and why.

deliverables: A list of open questions or edge cases

rubric.description: Both approaches are represented accurately and charitably.
The recommendation is contingent, nuanced, and evidence-based.
A reader could use the comparison to make a real decision.
